topics.title: Potential Lawsuit Over Weight Loss Product
topics.summary: The studio discusses a potential $100 million lawsuit from an advertiser who claims their weight loss product was disparaged during a broadcast involving guest "Cabbie."

topics.title: Sal's Marriage and Relationship Conflict
topics.summary: The studio discusses Sal's decision to prioritize his marriage and children over personal pride following a public dispute regarding his wife's infidelity.

topics.title: Marriage Struggles and Emotional Friends
topics.summary: The studio explores the complexities of a marriage strained by an "emotional friend" while debating the boundaries of forgiveness and personal responsibility in long-term relationships.

topics.title: Star Wars Characters and Weight Loss Diets
topics.summary: The studio discusses the portrayal of Darth Nihilus and the Gomorrion Guard in Star Wars, followed by a segment featuring Robin Quivers discussing her recent weight loss and a discussion on the caloric content of Starbucks drinks.

topics.title: Comedy Theft and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the ethics of comedians stealing material, a guest's experience as a former comedian who admitted to using stolen jokes, and upcoming media projects for Artie Lange.

topics.title: Mike Bloomberg and Political Comparisons
topics.summary: The studio discusses Mike Bloomberg’s potential presidential run and engages in a series of hypothetical comparisons regarding political viability and identity.

topics.title: Psychic Abilities and Vitamin Water Acquisition
topics.summary: The studio explores the validity of psychics through a challenge to identify a secret word left by a deceased father, while also discussing the multi-billion dollar acquisition of Vitamin Water by Coca-Cola.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Merger and Psychic Challenge
topics.summary: The studio discusses the political implications of the XM and Sirius merger before a psychic attempts to guess a secret password shared between Artie Lange and his late father.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Guest Interviews
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion of tabloid reports regarding Katie Couric, rumors about Kelly Clarkson and Fergie, and an interview with guest Bigfoot regarding his personal life and career.

topics.title: Ass-Based Identification Game
topics.summary: The studio hosts a game where participants attempt to identify various objects placed in their buttocks by feeling them with their glutes.

topics.title: Media Coverage and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including local media reports on radio success, upcoming segments featuring various guests, and listener feedback regarding recent appearances by Pam Anderson.

topics.title: Tommy Lee Lawsuit and Vatican Driving Rules
topics.summary: The studio discusses Tommy Lee's lawsuit against his management for reality show appearances, the media coverage of a judge in the Anna Nicole Smith case, and the Vatican's new guidelines on the morality of driving.

topics.title: Legal Disputes and News Reports
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including the O.J. Simpson book leak, a plastic surgeon's license revocation, research on how people view nude photos, and various news reports involving missing persons and animal attacks.

topics.title: Hillary Clinton Campaign and Pop Culture News
topics.summary: The show covers Hillary Clinton's use of a Celine Dion song for her campaign, the death of Ed Friendly, various film reviews, and updates on Artie Lange's tour.
